g5_voiceover.notes: RESOLVED via ARC NSAccessibility bridge. VoiceOver on M4 confirmed: window title + 4 labeled landmarks navigable (Workspace tree/Editor/ARC dock/Status rail). Two bugs fixed during bring-up: setAccessibilityElement must be false (container, not leaf) and child elements need real non-zero screen frames (VO culls zero-frame). a11y semantic tree is framework-free (arc_ui::a11y) → reusable if floem escape executes.
g5_voiceover.raw_data_path: operator VoiceOver confirmation 2026-06-12 (Workspace tree/Editor/ARC dock/Status rail announced)
g5_voiceover.remediation: No accesskit feature in published gpui=0.2.2 on crates.io. Options: (a) add NSAccessibility bridge on ShellChromeView, (b) vendor/patch gpui with AccessKit path, (c) upgrade gpui pin to a rev that exposes accesskit support. Required before FINAL.

g6_ime.notes: InputHandler wired and confirmed on M4: Option+e then e composes é INLINE in the palette TypeBox (not a floating window) — proves the NSTextInputClient marked-text/commit pipe works via replace_and_mark_text_in_range/replace_text_in_range. Dead-key (ABC layout) path PASS. Full CJK rerun (JA nihongo→にほんご→日本語, ZH nihao→你好, KO gksrnrdj) still pending: requires adding the Japanese/Pinyin/Korean input sources (only Swedish enabled on this box). CJK exercises the multi-syllable marked-text path more heavily; dead-key proves the same underlying mechanism.
g6_ime.raw_data_path: operator confirmation 2026-06-12: dead-key é inline in palette TypeBox
g6_ime.remediation: Implement gpui::InputHandler on the text-input element. Standard gpui pattern; Zed editor does this.

g7_bidi.notes: bidi_sample_lines() are rendered in the gpui spike TakeScreenshot phase (confirmed: lines set in ShellPortView.on_key Action::TakeScreenshot arm). Screenshot not captured during spike run. Re-run spike and screenshot when mixed-script text visible (Arabic RTL + LTR Latin + combining marks from g7-golden/sample.txt).
